CustomField.formula:
IF( RecordType.DeveloperName ="Invoice", InvoicePOSTotalTimeCHF__c+InvoicePOSTotalExpenseCHF__c+InvoicePOSTotalSupplierCostCHF__c,
IF( RecordType.DeveloperName ="Cancellation",
(CancellationInvoiceRelation__r.InvoicePOSTotalTimeCHF__c+ CancellationInvoiceRelation__r.InvoicePOSTotalExpenseCHF__c+ CancellationInvoiceRelation__r.InvoicePOSTotalSupplierCostCHF__c)*-1,
IF( RecordType.DeveloperName ="Credit", (InvoicePOSTotalTimeCHF__c+InvoicePOSTotalExpenseCHF__c+InvoicePOSTotalSupplierCostCHF__c)*-1,
IF( RecordType.DeveloperName ="ILV", ILVPOSTotalTimeCHF__c*-1, 0))))
CustomField.label: Total Invoice incl. Cancellation (CHF)
